article_meta.title: Business Climate change study that overestimated economic impact is pulled — but not before banks relied on it By Taylor Herzlich Published Dec

reasoning: No attribution violations, but the model missed several clear author-prose biases (e.g., 'massive 62% drop,' 'still a big blow...not nearly as catastrophic,' 'rampant flooding,' and the framing 'but not until after central banks...'). One flagged 'Slant' instance is debatable as it cites a factual sentence rather than demonstrating structural imbalance.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged text is in the author’s prose; no quoted or attributed language was misattributed.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: ‘Faulty number’ as Word Choice is defensible; the ‘Slant’ item is questionable because it quotes a factual sentence to infer structural bias.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple strong instances: ‘massive 62% drop,’ ‘still a big blow...not nearly as catastrophic,’ ‘rampant flooding’ photo caption, and headline/body framing (‘but not until after central banks...’).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Word Choice is correct; ‘Slant’ is arguable/misaligned since the cited sentence itself is neutral and structural imbalance wasn’t clearly demonstrated.
